name: PER_ASG_ELIGIBLE_JOBS
description: This table stores all the information about the eligible jobs that a worker has been authorized to work under. This is not a date effective table.

columns.Name: ASG_ELG_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: This is a system generated primary key for this table

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: This is a foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M table.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This is a Foreign key to PER_PERSONS table.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: JOB_ID
columns.Comments: This is a foreign key to PER_JOBS_F.

columns.Name: FROM_DATE
columns.Comments: Start date of the authorized eligible job.

columns.Name: TO_DATE
columns.Comments: End date of the authorized eligible job.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ASG_ELIG_OBJ_ID
columns.Comments: This is a duplicate id which will be used as the object id for the transaction approval purpose.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OVERRIDE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to indicate whether the Derived Rate will be overridden

columns.Name: RATE
columns.Comments: Overridden rate of the elligible job.

columns.Name: FREQUENCY
columns.Comments: Frequency if rate is overridden.

columns.Name: CURRENCY
columns.Comments: Currency if rate is overridden.

columns.Name: JOB_FAMILY_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Primary Key for the Job Family Table PER_JOB_FAMILY_F

columns.Name: BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: Determinant for Set Enabled tables and those using BU as a partitioning key.

columns.Name: RATE_DEFINITION_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Primary Key for the Rate Definitions table PAY_RATE_DEFINITIONS_F.

columns.Name: ATTR1_VALUE
columns.Comments: This column has been added for future use purpose.

columns.Name: ATTR2_VALUE
columns.Comments: This column has been added for future use purpose.

columns.Name: ATTR_NUMBER1
columns.Comments: This column has been added for future use purpose.

columns.Name: ATTR_NUMBER2
columns.Comments: This column has been added for future use purpose.

columns.Name: ATTR_DATE1
columns.Comments: This column has been added for future use purpose.

columns.Name: ATTR_DATE2
columns.Comments: This column has been added for future use purpose.
